subcodes.first_line: Every possessor of tongue and eye and understanding hath testified to that which the Lord of Names hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد کل ذی لسان و ذی عین و ذی درایه بما شهد مالک الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @justice and wrath of God, @law of Huququ'llah, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @oneness; unity of religion, @law of burial and cremation, @the power of words; of speech
